caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show. He is wearing a green cap and headphones, and appears to be engaged in conversation, as he is seen speaking into the microphone with expressive facial movements. The setting seems to be a studio within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional recording session, possibly for a show called "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the corner of the screen.
